name: cookies-ts-fix
task:
Fix a TypeScript return type mismatch in /home/ariel/Documents/anavi-main/anavi/server/_core/cookies.ts.

The function `getSessionCookieOptions` has a return type Pick<CookieOptions, "domain" | "httpOnly" | "path" | "sameSite" | "secure"> but `domain` is commented out of the actual return object, causing a type error in Vercel builds.

Steps:
1. Read the file: server/_core/cookies.ts
2. Find the function signature — change Pick<CookieOptions, "domain" | "httpOnly" | ...> to Pick<CookieOptions, "httpOnly" | "path" | "sameSite" | "secure"> (remove 'domain')
3. Run: cd /home/ariel/Documents/anavi-main/anavi && pnpm check 2>&1 | tail -10
4. Report what you changed and confirm pnpm check is clean.

name: express-types-dep
task:
Move @types/express from devDependencies to dependencies in /home/ariel/Documents/anavi-main/anavi/package.json to fix Vercel build failures where devDeps may not be installed.

Steps:
1. Read: /home/ariel/Documents/anavi-main/anavi/package.json
2. Find '@types/express' in devDependencies — note its version
3. Remove it from devDependencies, add it to dependencies with the same version
4. Run: cd /home/ariel/Documents/anavi-main/anavi && pnpm install 2>&1 | tail -5
5. Run: pnpm check 2>&1 | tail -10
6. Report the change.

name: payout-utils
task:
Create a new shared utility file /home/ariel/Documents/anavi-main/anavi/client/src/lib/payoutUtils.ts to eliminate duplicated raw-payout mapping code that currently exists in both AttributionLedger.tsx and Portfolio.tsx.

Steps:
1. Read both files:
   - /home/ariel/Documents/anavi-main/anavi/client/src/pages/AttributionLedger.tsx
   - /home/ariel/Documents/anavi-main/anavi/client/src/pages/Portfolio.tsx
2. Identify the duplicated payout mapping pattern (raw `as unknown as Array<...>` casts, amount parsing, etc.)
3. Create /home/ariel/Documents/anavi-main/anavi/client/src/lib/payoutUtils.ts with:
   - `RawPayout` interface extending Record<string, unknown> with id: number, amount: number | string
   - `MappedPayout` interface with id, deal, amount, status, payoutType fields
   - `mapRawPayout(p: RawPayout): MappedPayout` function
4. Update AttributionLedger.tsx and Portfolio.tsx to import and use the new utility instead of inline casts
5. Run: cd /home/ariel/Documents/anavi-main/anavi && pnpm check 2>&1 | tail -15
6. Report all changes and confirm clean.

name: c4-flow-primitives
task:
Build the C4 shared UI flow primitive components per PRD at /home/ariel/Documents/anavi-main/anavi/docs/plans/2026-03-02-prd-c4-dashboard-flow-elegance-system.md

Read the PRD first, then create these 4 new components in /home/ariel/Documents/anavi-main/anavi/client/src/components/:

1. FlowRibbon.tsx — A horizontal ribbon showing 4 state chips: 'Now', 'Next', 'Risk', 'Value at Stake'. Props: { now: string; next: string; risk: string; valueAtStake: string; className?: string }

2. DecisionCard.tsx — A card with primary CTA + secondary 'inspect' CTA, a confidence line, and a freshness line. Props: { title: string; primaryAction: string; onPrimaryAction: () => void; secondaryAction?: string; onSecondaryAction?: () => void; confidence: string; freshness: string; children?: React.ReactNode; className?: string }

3. InlineProofChip.tsx — Small status chip with variants: 'verified' | 'sealed' | 'attribution-locked' | 'audit-trail'. Props: { variant: 'verified' | 'sealed' | 'attribution-locked' | 'audit-trail'; label?: string }

4. MicroKpiRail.tsx — Compact KPI display with trend + threshold + status. Props: { label: string; value: string | number; trend?: 'up' | 'down' | 'flat'; threshold?: string; status?: 'green' | 'amber' | 'red'; className?: string }

Design tokens to use:
- Navy: #0A1628 (darkest), #1E3A5F (secondary)
- Gold: #C4972A (accent)
- Trust green: #059669
- Animation: 180-260ms ease-out, respect prefers-reduced-motion
- Use Tailwind classes and existing shadcn/ui primitives from @/components/ui/*

After creating all 4 files:
- Run: cd /home/ariel/Documents/anavi-main/anavi && pnpm check 2>&1 | tail -15
- Confirm TypeScript clean
- Report what each component renders

name: dealrooms-filter-fix
